evidence_notes: Actual repaired SVGs were read from pipeline/iconforge/assets/svg/owned_repair_batch60/ in the detached copy.
Candidate day/dusk/night renders were read from pipeline/iconforge/out/standard_repair_batch52/renders and OpenCPN/source-variant references from pipeline/iconforge/out.

Each verdict was checked against pipeline/iconforge/catalog/standard_source_table.json row metadata, semantic_brief, S-57 shape/color/pattern conditions, repaired SVGs, prior latest judge history, and available exact candidate/reference renders.
The batch60 repair replaces prior beacon tower/stake placeholder silhouettes with stake/pole or tapered tower bodies carrying row colour and band semantics.
All exact OpenCPN/source render witnesses were present in this detached copy for the 24 selected BCNSTK/BCNTOW rows.
Passes are judge_pass_pending_final_approval only and grant zero final approvals.

selection.pass_semantics: pass-pending-human only; this artifact grants zero final approvals
selection.selection_note: Judged owned_repair_batch60 against row metadata, semantic_brief, S-57 shape/color/pattern conditions, source/provider references, repaired SVGs, prior latest judge history, and available candidate/reference renders. Scope is exactly the 24 repaired BCNTOW/BCNSTK beacon tower/stake rows in owned_repair_batch60.

verdicts.expected: BCNSTK05 must preserve stake/perch beacon; required colours white; S-57/S-52 conditions: BCNSHP1, COLOUR1.
verdicts.judge_comments: Pass pending human: stake/pole beacon silhouette, black base cue, and white colour/pattern semantics match the row metadata and exact OpenCPN/source references closely enough for judge_pass_pending_final_approval. No final approval is granted.
verdicts.observed: After render preserves a narrow stake/pole beacon body with black outline/base and required white fill, matching the OpenCPN/source stake silhouette apart from generated stroke/scale.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
